text.paragraph: HEDIS MY2025 measures addressed in this document per NCQA value sets:

list.item: COA: Care for Older Adults - Compliant MY2025
PCE: Potentially Harmful Drug-Disease Interactions - Compliant MY2025
COL: Colorectal Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
EED: Eye Exam for Patients with Diabetes - Compliant MY2025
PPC: Prenatal and Postpartum Care - Compliant MY2025
ADD: ADHD Medication Management - Compliant MY2025
CDC: Comprehensive Diabetes Care - Compliant MY2025
SPC: Statin Therapy for Cardiovascular Disease - Compliant MY2025
CCS: Cervical Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
IMA: Immunizations for Adolescents - Compliant MY2025
AMR: Asthma Medication Ratio - Compliant MY2025
CBP: Controlling High Blood Pressure - Compliant MY2025
DAE: Drug Interactions in Older Adults - Compliant MY2025
W34: Well-Child Visits - Compliant MY2025
OHD: Osteoporosis Management in Women - Compliant MY2025
AWC: Adolescent Well-Care Visit - Compliant MY2025
BCS: Breast Cancer Screening - Compliant MY2025
FUH: Follow-Up After Mental Illness Hospitalization - Compliant MY2025
HBD: HbA1c Control for Diabetes - Compliant MY2025
MRP: Medication Reconciliation Post-Discharge - Compliant MY2025

text.paragraph: The following HEDIS measures from NCQA MY2025 value sets are addressed:

list.item: COA: Care for Older Adults
PCE: Potentially Harmful Drug-Disease Interactions
COL: Colorectal Cancer Screening
EED: Eye Exam for Patients with Diabetes
PPC: Prenatal and Postpartum Care
ADD: ADHD Medication Management
CDC: Comprehensive Diabetes Care
SPC: Statin Therapy for Cardiovascular Disease
CCS: Cervical Cancer Screening
IMA: Immunizations for Adolescents
AMR: Asthma Medication Ratio
CBP: Controlling High Blood Pressure
DAE: Drug Interactions in Older Adults
W34: Well-Child Visits
OHD: Osteoporosis Management in Women
AWC: Adolescent Well-Care Visit
BCS: Breast Cancer Screening
FUH: Follow-Up After Mental Illness Hospitalization
HBD: HbA1c Control for Diabetes
MRP: Medication Reconciliation Post-Discharge
